name: codex-paper
description: Turn research papers into structured study environments with generated notes, grounded follow-up Q&A, code demos, and a local web viewer.

interface.shortDescription: Study papers with generated materials, follow-up Q&A, and a local viewer
interface.longDescription: Generate structured study materials for research papers, keep a local paper library, ask grounded follow-up questions, and browse the results through the bundled Nuxt-based web viewer.
defaultPrompt: Study a research paper PDF and generate a reusable learning workspace
Summarize this paper and add it to my local research library
Launch the Codex Paper web viewer for my saved papers
Ask a grounded follow-up question about a saved paper study package
